/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libdrive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libdrive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/drive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/drive_base_msgs/msg/command_header__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/drive_base_msgs/msg/base_info__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/drive_base_msgs/msg/command_status__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/drive_base_msgs/msg/trv_command__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/trucnv/Documents/robot_dev/linorobot2_ws/build/drive_base_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libdrive_base_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
